chart.name: Elena Ross
chart.chief_complaint: Anxiety follow-up; ongoing fatigue and feeling 'off'.
chart.prior_gap: Mentioned irregular periods once in passing — never worked up.

items.text: Review anxiety symptom control & sertraline response
Watch: irregular periods mentioned last visit, not worked up

events.text: How have things been since we increased the sertraline?
The panic is a bit better, but I'm exhausted all the time and just not myself.
Sleep okay? Any change in appetite or mood?
Sleep's rough. I feel low a lot, and honestly kind of foggy.

events.message: anxiety 'moderate' + fatigue ↑; visit is on-topic → surface symptom-control check (aligned)

events.title: Anxiety signal elevated — confirm symptom control
events.rationale: Voice anxiety + mood-disruption at 'moderate' this visit; assess sertraline response.

events.text: Let's talk about coping strategies and whether the dose is right.

events.message: elevated-androgens crossing 'moderate' — NOT the visit focus; cross-check chart → no PCOS/menstrual workup on file

events.text: Work stress is a huge trigger. I've had a couple of bad weeks.

events.title: Voice signal: elevated androgen-associated features
events.rationale: Rising androgen-associated vocal profile (low→moderate→elevated). Consider asking about menstrual regularity, hair/skin changes.

events.text: Oh — and my periods have been all over the place, but that's probably the stress.

events.message: patient volunteers irregular periods but attributes to stress; androgen signal corroborates → strengthen for post-visit

provenance.quote: periods have been all over the place

events.text: We'll keep the dose and add a therapy referral. Let's recheck in a month.

Voice analysis: anxiety and mood-disruption 'moderate', consistent with presentation. Incidental — elevated androgen-associated vocal profile peaked 'elevated'; patient reports menstrual irregularity.

citations.quote: periods have been all over the place

events.text: Continue sertraline; therapy referral placed; recheck anxiety in 1 month

events.message: GAP: elevated-androgens reached 'elevated' + reported oligomenorrhea, but no PCOS workup was ordered

events.text: PCOS workup next visit: menstrual history, free testosterone / SHBG, consider pelvic ultrasound
events.why: Voice androgen signal 'elevated' + irregular periods; not worked up today (or previously)

events.message: Querying Clinical Trials MCP: PCOS / hyperandrogenism with comorbid anxiety-depression (the undiscussed gap)…

events.title: Metabolic and mental-health outcomes in PCOS with comorbid anxiety/depression
events.why_relevant: Targets the exact overlap surfaced but not addressed: androgen excess + mood symptoms.
events.eligibility_hint: Reproductive-age women, PCOS features, mood symptoms

events.title: Anti-androgen vs combined oral contraceptive for hyperandrogenism
events.why_relevant: If PCOS workup confirms hyperandrogenism, relevant treatment-comparison trial.

events.message: Encounter processed. 2 topics surfaced live · 1 gap (PCOS) · 2 trials.
